summary: Completed testing of Worker Service Assignment feature (booking flow improvements). All 15 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests verified: 4-step booking flow (Date→Professional→Time→Confirm), 'Cualquiera disponible' option, time slots with worker names, confirmation with duration/time range, and team page service checkboxes.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/businesses/{id}/workers - returns all active workers - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/businesses/{id}/workers?service_id=X - filters workers by service - PASSED
Backend: Workers with empty service_ids returned for any service (legacy behavior) - PASSED
Backend: PUT /api/businesses/my/workers/{id}/services - updates worker service_ids - PASSED
Backend: Update worker with multiple services - PASSED
Backend: Clear worker services (empty array = all services) - PASSED
Backend: Update worker services without auth returns 401 - PASSED
Backend: Update services for non-existent worker returns 404 - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/bookings/availability without worker filter returns slots - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/bookings/availability with worker_id filter - PASSED
Backend: Availability filters workers by service_ids - PASSED
Backend: Existing worker service assignments verified - PASSED
Backend: Filter by nonexistent service returns workers without service_ids - PASSED
Backend: Worker data includes service_ids for frontend badge rendering - PASSED
Backend: Cleanup - reset workers - PASSED
Frontend: Business profile booking dialog has 4 steps (Fecha, Profesional, Hora, Confirmar) - PASSED
Frontend: Step 2 shows 'Cualquiera disponible' option with data-testid='worker-any' - PASSED
Frontend: Step 2 shows list of individual workers for the service - PASSED
Frontend: Step 3 shows time slots with time range and worker name - PASSED
Frontend: Step 4 shows confirmation with duration and time range (HH:MM - HH:MM) - PASSED
Frontend: /business/team - Worker dialog has 'Servicios que realiza' section - PASSED
Frontend: /business/team - Service checkboxes with data-testid='worker-service-{id}' - PASSED
Frontend: /business/team - Worker card shows 'Todos los servicios' badge when no services assigned - PASSED

mocked_api_note.Cloudinary: NOT configured in preview env - uses Emergent Object Storage fallback

seed_data_creation: Created test user testbookerflow@bookvia.com for booking flow tests. Used existing worker 'Test Worker Duration' (e8156189-9cc2-4b3d-9f0e-2df518915bda)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Worker service assignment feature fully tested. Key points: (1) Workers with empty service_ids can do ALL services (legacy behavior), (2) Booking flow is now 4 steps: Date→Professional→Time→Confirm, (3) 'Cualquiera disponible' option uses worker_id='any' internally, (4) Time slots show worker name when 'anyone' is selected, (5) Confirmation shows duration and time range format, (6) Team page has service checkboxes with data-testid='worker-service-{service_id}'
